title: Creating a New Historical Figure
scenario: Design a new historical figure from a fictional ancient civilization. The target output should be a detailed persona description.
constraints: Must include a brief description of the figure's cultural background
Must highlight the figure's unique abilities and talents

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the constraints met (cultural background, unique abilities)?
Does the description showcase a rich and immersive tone?
Does the description accurately answer the prompt regarding the figure's fictional background?
